task: 1. Scaffold packages/database/src/action-draft.ts as the shared persistence/helper surface
commands: pnpm --filter @townbase/database exec ts-node --transpile-only --project tsconfig.json <<'NODE' import { createPrismaClient, DEFAULT_WORKSPACE_NAME, listActionDrafts, persistActionDraft, updateActionDraftStatus } from '@townbase/database'; async function main(): Promise<void> { const prisma = createPrismaClient(); await prisma.$connect(); const workspace = await prisma.workspace.findUniqueOrThrow({ where: { name: DEFAULT_WORKSPACE_NAME }, select: { id: true } }); await prisma.actionDraft.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); await prisma.knowledgeGap.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); await prisma.questionSource.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); await prisma.question.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); const question = await prisma.question.create({ data: { workspaceId: workspace.id, question: 'What is missing from the docs?', answer: null, requestedMode: 'documentation_gap', resolvedMode: 'documentation_gap', confidence: 0.2, isAnswerable: false } }); const gap = await prisma.knowledgeGap.create({ data: { workspaceId: workspace.id, questionId: question.id, category: 'documentation', title: 'Documentation gap: What is missing from the docs', description: 'No traced sources selected.', suggestedDocumentTitle: 'Document What is missing from the docs', suggestedMarkdownPath: 'docs/gaps/documentation-what-is-missing-from-the-docs.md', suggestedGithubIssueTitle: 'Document What is missing from the docs', priority: 'high', status: 'open', similarQuestionCount: 0, relatedMode: 'documentation_gap' } }); const created = await persistActionDraft(prisma, { workspaceId: workspace.id, knowledgeGapId: gap.id, type: 'markdown_doc', title: 'Document What is missing from the docs', body: 'First draft body' }); const replaced = await persistActionDraft(prisma, { workspaceId: workspace.id, knowledgeGapId: gap.id, type: 'markdown_doc', title: 'Document What is missing from the docs', body: 'Second draft body' }); await updateActionDraftStatus(prisma, { workspaceId: workspace.id, actionDraftId: replaced.id, status: 'copied' }); const drafts = await listActionDrafts(prisma, { workspaceId: workspace.id, knowledgeGapId: gap.id, type: 'markdown_doc' }); console.log(JSON.stringify({ workspaceId: workspace.id, gapId: gap.id, createdBody: created.body, replacedBody: replaced.body, draftCount: drafts.length, status: drafts[0]?.status, latestBody: drafts[0]?.body }, null, 2)); await prisma.actionDraft.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); await prisma.knowledgeGap.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); await prisma.questionSource.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); await prisma.question.deleteMany({ where: { workspaceId: workspace.id } }); await prisma.$disconnect(); } void main(); NODE
